title: vero-lite ontology v0
description: L1 JSON Schema for ADR-008 D2 grammar. Phase 1 (PLAN-003) v0 — only the canonical map-shaped form is accepted; the list-of-dicts illustration in PLAN-003 §8.6 is REJECTED by design (Lesson #5 §3 schema fidelity). ADR-0027 R2 (PLAN-0050) adds four OPTIONAL semantic-enrichment constructs (synonyms, sample_values, verified_queries, and quantity-binding grain/join_path); declaring none of them loads byte-identically to the pre-R2 grammar (the D2 backward-compat HARD INVARIANT).

version.description: Ontology content-revision number (0 = initial; increment on each content revision). Grammar conformance itself is fixed by ADR-008 D2. PLAN-0049 SD-2: version tracks revisions for future rigor.

closed.description: ADR-0033 D3: when true, the generated model rejects unknown fields (Pydantic extra="forbid"). Default false = open. Scoped to the shared Person (spec.py:1367).

quantity_bindings.description: ADR-0021 construct (b): declared quantity-kind <-> unit bindings. Each binds a measured_kind enum value to its coherent unit; the engine reads it from ontology meta.

verified_queries.description: ADR-0027 R2 (SD-B, object-type level): curated known-good NL question -> trusted-answer pairs for this object type. OPTIONAL; absent = pre-R2 grammar.

target.description: Required when type == ref; names another object_type.

items.description: Required when type == set (ADR-0033 D3); the scalar element type. v0: scalar-only — no nested collections, no ref items.

sample_values.description: ADR-0027 R2 (SD-3): representative values; the closed filtering set when populated. Distinct from an enum's `values` (a property may have neither, either, or both by intent). OPTIONAL; absent = pre-R2 grammar.

kind.description: A measured_kind enum value (checked against the enum in L2).

unit.description: The coherent unit bound to this kind.

grain.description: ADR-0027 R2 (SD-5): OPTIONAL aggregation grain for this measured kind (e.g. hourly, daily). Absent = pre-R2 grammar.

join_path.description: ADR-0027 R2 (SD-5): OPTIONAL join-path semantics for this measured kind. Absent = pre-R2 grammar.

synonyms.description: ADR-0027 R2 (SD-2): lang-keyed alternate names {th, en} for NL matching. At least one lang required when present; extra lang keys REJECTED (additionalProperties false). The th/en separation is the moat (F9). Attachable at object-type and property level (SD-1).

verifiedQuery.description: ADR-0027 R2 (SD-4): a curated known-good NL question -> trusted answer pair (least-coupling v1; NO IR/QueryFilter binding).

cardinality.description: many_to_many deferred per ADR-008 D4; model as explicit join object_type.
